scripts.bootstrap:db: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/bootstrap_neon.py'
scripts.dev:api: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api uvicorn api.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'
scripts.queue:publish: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/publish_outbox.py'
scripts.queue:release: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/release_priority_tasks.py'
scripts.worker:outbox: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/outbox_worker.py'
scripts.worker:priority: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run --project apps/api python apps/api/scripts/priority_release_worker.py'
scripts.workers:up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile workers up -d outbox-worker priority-worker
scripts.workers:down: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile workers stop outbox-worker priority-worker
